name: Moving Average Crossover
description: Detects when a fast moving average crosses a slow moving average. The classic 50/200 version is known as the Golden Cross (bullish) or Death Cross (bearish). This is one of the most widely used trend-following signals in technical analysis.
author: system

default_entry.description: Enter on the close of the bar where the crossover is confirmed

tunable_params.label: Fast MA Period
tunable_params.description: Number of bars for the fast (short-term) moving average

tunable_params.label: Slow MA Period
tunable_params.description: Number of bars for the slow (long-term) moving average

tunable_params.label: MA Type
tunable_params.description: Simple Moving Average (SMA) or Exponential Moving Average (EMA)

tunable_params.label: Cross Direction
tunable_params.description: Bullish = fast crosses ABOVE slow (Golden Cross). Bearish = fast crosses BELOW slow (Death Cross).

tunable_params.label: Min Volume Multiple
tunable_params.description: Minimum volume relative to 20-bar average. 0 = no filter.

tunable_params.label: Lookback Window
tunable_params.description: Only search for crossovers in the last N bars

tunable_params.label: Trend Filter
tunable_params.description: Require price to be on the correct side of the slow MA

tunable_params.label: Confirmation Bars
tunable_params.description: Number of bars the cross must hold before it is considered confirmed
